records.m_Talk_ENG: A long time ago, there was a legend that was told across the nine continents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A long time ago, there was a legend that was told across the nine continents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A long time ago, there was a legend that was told across the nine continents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A bland legend that spoke of the arrival of the Savior, appointed by the heavens, who would save everyone from suffering.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A bland legend that spoke of the arrival of the Savior, appointed by the heavens, who would save everyone from suffering.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A bland legend that spoke of the arrival of the Savior, appointed by the heavens, who would save everyone from suffering.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is said that he would reveal himself to a woman praying for hope in a dark age and claim that he came searching for the Saintess, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is said that he would reveal himself to a woman praying for hope in a dark age and claim that he came searching for the Saintess, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is said that he would reveal himself to a woman praying for hope in a dark age and claim that he came searching for the Saintess, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was such a distant story, as I was a slave at the time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was such a distant story, as I was a slave at the time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was such a distant story, as I was a slave at the time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-dancing is harder than I thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-dancing is harder than I thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-dancing is harder than I thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I offered, but I'm not doing well at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I offered, but I'm not doing well at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I offered, but I'm not doing well at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is okay. I'm not used to this either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is okay. I'm not used to this either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is okay. I'm not used to this either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now... please follow my lead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now... please follow my lead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now... please follow my lead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's an amazing feeling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's an amazing feeling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's an amazing feeling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The person who I thought was just a myth is standing right in front of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The person who I thought was just a myth is standing right in front of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The person who I thought was just a myth is standing right in front of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... how you do it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... how you do it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... how you do it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you're doing great, just as I thought you would.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you're doing great, just as I thought you would.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you're doing great, just as I thought you would.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hand I couldn't get myself to hold when we first met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hand I couldn't get myself to hold when we first met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hand I couldn't get myself to hold when we first met.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your heartbeat. Your breath. Everything is so vivid now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your heartbeat. Your breath. Everything is so vivid now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your heartbeat. Your breath. Everything is so vivid now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lucrecia, you've been acting more formal towards me since you became the Saintess, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lucrecia, you've been acting more formal towards me since you became the Saintess, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lucrecia, you've been acting more formal towards me since you became the Saintess, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know better before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know better before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know better before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know... what you were like, either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know... what you were like, either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know... what you were like, either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not trying to scold you or anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not trying to scold you or anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not trying to scold you or anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just wanted to say that you can talk to me like you did before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just wanted to say that you can talk to me like you did before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just wanted to say that you can talk to me like you did before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really mind that kind of stuff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really mind that kind of stuff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really mind that kind of stuff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not abide by that. As Saintess, I cannot talk to you in a blasphemous manner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not abide by that. As Saintess, I cannot talk to you in a blasphemous manner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not abide by that. As Saintess, I cannot talk to you in a blasphemous manner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-blasphemous seems like a stretch...
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-blasphemous seems like a stretch...
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-blasphemous seems like a stretch...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you... prefer the old me, Savior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you... prefer the old me, Savior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you... prefer the old me, Savior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all. You're you, no matter your appearance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all. You're you, no matter your appearance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all. You're you, no matter your appearance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But sometimes, I do think you look a lot different than how you did before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But sometimes, I do think you look a lot different than how you did before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But sometimes, I do think you look a lot different than how you did before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you are a woman after all. Is there someone you're trying to impress?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you are a woman after all. Is there someone you're trying to impress?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you are a woman after all. Is there someone you're trying to impress?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh.*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh.*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh.*

records.m_Talk_ENG: You dummy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You dummy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You dummy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What did you say, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What did you say, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What did you say, Lucrecia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Never mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Never mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Never mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is where it gets tricky, so please follow my movement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is where it gets tricky, so please follow my movement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is where it gets tricky, so please follow my movement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful not to fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful not to fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful not to fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get closer to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get closer to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get closer to me.
